# No-QB Live-Safe Baseline Comparison

*Generated by `sportslab no-qb-baseline` (v2.0.0, 2026-06-23)*

## Overview

Compares the full incumbent (with QB-change features from oracle data)
against a no-QB variant using only pregame-safe features
(Elo prob + rolling_mov_3). The no-QB variant is the model's
performance without any starter identity or QB-change signal.

## Models Compared

| Model | Features | QB Dependency |
|-------|----------|---------------|
| Incumbent | qb_changed + rolling_mov_3 | Oracle qb_changed |
| No-QB Live-Safe | rolling_mov_3 only | None (pregame-safe) |

## Overall 2025 Simulation

| Metric | Incumbent | No-QB Live-Safe | Δ |
|--------|-----------|-----------------|---|
| log_loss | 0.6284 | 0.6278 | -0.0006 |
| brier | 0.2191 | 0.2187 | -0.0004 |
| accuracy | 0.663 | 0.6667 | +0.0037 |
| games | 276 | 276 | — |
